Table summary. Responsibility Area: Software selection. Treasurer: Provides finance requirements; reviews reporting and control needs.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Provides workflow input; tests usability; supports setup if assigned.. Finance Committee: Leads evaluation, recommendation, implementation direction, and control requirements.. Personnel Committee: Consults on staffing, training, and job-impact questions.. Nominating Committee: No primary role.. Pastor: Consults on ministry and administrative needs.. Deacons: Reviews if cost, policy, or leadership impact requires.. Congregation: Votes if required by budget, contract, or church policy.. Responsibility Area: Treasurer candidate / officer recommendation. Treasurer: Provides transition input if currently serving or interim.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: No role.. Finance Committee: Consults on needed finance skills and role expectations.. Personnel Committee: Consults only if personnel policy or job-description language is involved.. Nominating Committee: Leads nomination if bylaws assign this role.. Pastor: Consults and supports transition communication.. Deacons: Reviews or counsels if church practice requires.. Congregation: Votes if bylaws require election or confirmation.. Responsibility Area: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator hiring. Treasurer: Provides role and workflow input; may participate in interviews if assigned.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Applicant or role holder; no approval role.. Finance Committee: Defines finance duties, controls, budget impact, and reporting needs; adjusts budget to fund this specific operational need under the June 28, 2026 motion.. Personnel Committee: Leads hiring process, application, interview, references, compensation recommendation, and evaluation process under the authority already granted by congregational vote.. Nominating Committee: Works with Personnel Committee to add the position as named in the June 28, 2026 motion; no candidate hiring authority unless bylaws or policy assign it.. Pastor: Consults on supervision, office workflow, and ministry fit.. Deacons: Reviews if leadership practice or budget impact requires.. Congregation: Authorized a paid, part-time Bookkeeper position on June 28, 2026, not to exceed $150 per week, described as $18.75 per hour for approximately 8 hours; votes again only if scope, compensation, budget, or policy exceeds that authorization.. Responsibility Area: Treasurer job description approval. Treasurer: Provides input on practicality and transition needs.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: No role.. Finance Committee: Defines financial governance, controls, reporting, and committee relationship.. Personnel Committee: Helps format and maintain role description if assigned.. Nominating Committee: Reviews if tied to elected officer nomination.. Pastor: Consults.. Deacons: Reviews if church practice requires.. Congregation: Approves if bylaws or church policy require.. Responsibility Area: Bookkeeper job description approval. Treasurer: Provides workflow and reporting input.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Provides practical feedback if role is already filled.. Finance Committee: Approves or recommends finance duties, access, controls, and reporting requirements.. Personnel Committee: Leads drafting and recommends final job description, qualifications, compensation, and evaluation process.. Nominating Committee: No primary role.. Pastor: Consults on supervision and office workflow.. Deacons: Reviews if leadership practice requires.. Congregation: Prior authorization supports hiring; votes again only if compensation, budget change, or policy requires.. Responsibility Area: Reimbursement approval. Treasurer: Reviews documentation and policy compliance; approves if assigned by policy.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Processes requests after documentation and approval are complete; tracks missing receipts.. Finance Committee: Owns reimbursement policy, approval thresholds, exceptions, and monthly review.. Personnel Committee: Consults only if staff or volunteer-role accountability is affected.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: May approve ministry expenses if assigned by policy.. Deacons: Reviews exceptions if leadership practice requires.. Congregation: Votes only if reimbursement policy or budget impact requires.. Responsibility Area: Budget oversight. Treasurer: Reviews reports and helps explain variances..
